creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello this information is severly lacking information. Please send an 
email to questions@FreeBSD.org to try to get this going and providing 
more information. If you still cannot get it to work, please get back to 
me with information about your system, possibly a dmesg and things like 
that. The information you now provided means we cannot help you in 
anyway. Thanks for the willingness to use FreeBSD though!!
